alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; experience translates to cross-functional stakeholder management and commercial execution
alignments.job_requirement: Drive strategic customer and partner engagements in partnership with Sales, Solution Engineering and GTM teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient in SQL—joins, GROUP BY, subqueries/CTEs, window functions; queries BigQuery directly to pull and shape own data
alignments.job_requirement: Hands-on expertise with SQL and SQL analytics

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google with two promotions in commercial operations and transformation; experience managing teams and scaling programs, though background is commercial operations rather than pre-sales/solution engineering leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Build and lead a team of Partner Solution Engineers who serve as technical sales leaders and trusted advisors

alignments.candidate_evidence: Google background provides exposure to cloud infrastructure and GCP; no explicit evidence of AWS, Azure, or cloud architecture design
alignments.job_requirement: Understanding of cloud architectures and services involving SaaS solutions with popular cloud providers (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product experience comes from ownership, requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation; Salesforce admin experience includes partnering with engineering on feature requests
alignments.job_requirement: Drive product gaps and roadmap processes as the Voice of the Field with product and engineering

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration
alignments.job_requirement: AI-native thinker treating AI as a high-trust collaborator core to problem-solving

gaps.gap: No Solution Engineering, pre-sales, or customer-facing technical sales background; candidate background is Commercial Operations and transformation
gaps.mitigation: Would require 6-12 months onboarding and mentorship in pre-sales culture, customer technical engagement models, and reference architecture design; unlikely to close fully without prior SE leadership

gaps.gap: No demonstrated AWS, Azure, or multi-cloud platform architecture and optimization experience; depth of cloud-native design is unclear despite GCP exposure
gaps.mitigation: Requires self-driven cloud platform certification and hands-on architecture training; background in Devices at Google may not translate to data warehousing cloud strategy

gaps.gap: No partner ecosystem (GSI, CSP, DCP, strategic alliances) experience; no indication of managing or enabling third-party technical organizations
gaps.mitigation: Partner channel strategy, co-selling, and joint solution development are distinct from internal transformation; would need external coaching and partner engagement immersion

gaps.gap: Unclear depth of direct line management and team building at scale (hiring, training, retention); eight years tenure with two promotions, but management scope not detailed
gaps.mitigation: If candidate has managed 10+ engineers/analysts, foundation exists; if <5 reports, gap is significant for VP headcount and P&L ownership

gaps.gap: Product/roadmap voice as field advocate is operations-driven rather than customer/partner-driven solution design; no evidence of working with product teams on technical customer constraints
gaps.mitigation: Requires reframing from internal process ownership to external customer/partner problem-first mindset; stakeholder listening skills likely present but strategic influence direction differs

output.level_rationale: Regional VP with 4+ years direct line management and 15+ years industry experience requirement anchors to L6. Vice-President title, team ownership, P&L responsibility, reporting to VP, and escalation ownership for customers and product leadership across partner tiers and complex enterprise segments (GSI/CSP/DCP/SAP) are L6+ signals. No information on company size/stage provided in Role JSON.
output.summary: Regional VP role in Solution Engineering leading Partner SE teams across GSI/CSP/DCP tiers, owning P&L, product roadmap voice, and team building. Candidate has strong AI tooling expertise, SQL, dashboarding, and eight years of commercial operations and transformation leadership at Google with two promotions. Critical gaps: no pre-sales or solution engineering background, no demonstrated AWS/Azure/multi-cloud architecture design, no Solution Engineering or partner ecosystem experience, and role requires 15+ years pre-sales/customer-facing expertise with 4+ years direct management—eight years total tenure with unclear line management depth. Role family fit is stretched (commercial ops to pre-sales/partner se leadership). Seniority (L6) exceeds target band (L4–L5), and gaps are substantial and domain-specific rather than quickly developable.
uncertainties: Unclear depth and breadth of candidate's direct line management experience (hiring, training, retention) over the eight years
No explicit evidence of pre-sales, solution architecture, or customer-facing technical selling background
AWS, Azure, and multi-cloud architecture experience not demonstrated; depth of cloud knowledge unclear
Partner ecosystem, ISV/GSI/CSP/DCP engagement experience not stated in profile
Scope of commercial operations transformation—whether strategic/cross-functional or operational-process focused—not detailed
